- What changed?
- Why?

## Validation

- [ ] `bash -n install.sh`
- [ ] `bash -n scripts/install-codex-ba-kit.sh` if Codex installer changed
- [ ] install flow tested if installer changed
- [ ] `bash scripts/test-md-to-html.sh` if HTML packaging changed
- [ ] affected docs updated
- [ ] internal paths and links checked for touched files
- [ ] affected templates or rules updated

- Any assumptions, risks, or follow-up work
